scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env.local && cp ai-engine/.env.example ai-engine/.env && echo '\n✅ Setup complete! Edit .env files with your API keys.'
